params.StackDescription: Change the text of target permanent by replacing all instances of one color word with another or one basic land type with another until end of turn.
params.SpellDescription: Change the text of target permanent by replacing all instances of one color word with another or one basic land type with another until end of turn. (For example, you may change "nonred creature" to "nongreen creature" or "plainswalk" to "swampwalk.")

remaining_params.StackDescription: Change the text of target permanent by replacing all instances of one color word with another or one basic land type with another until end of turn.
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Change the text of target permanent by replacing all instances of one color word with another or one basic land type with another until end of turn. (For example, you may change "nonred creature" to "nongreen creature" or "plainswalk" to "swampwalk.")
